title: Damon Krell
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Damon_Krell.jpg]] |name=Damon Krell |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]][[Star Wars (1977) 45|''Star Wars'' (1977) 45]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|The Rebels will soon know the ''fullest measure'' of those capabilities—and the ''Emperor'' himself will praise the name of Admiral ''Damon Krell.''|Damon Krell|}} '''Damon Krell''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] in command of a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. Krell oversaw the production of the augmented [[Infiltrator probe droid]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], which he used in a plot to destroy the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] in a bid for recognition from the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]]. However, his chosen [[13-K|droid]] suffered a critical error during the mission, resulting in it instead destroying Krell's [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|We're not doing this for amusement... but to ''destroy'' the Rebel fleet.|Damon Krell|}} An [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Damon Krell was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who by [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] rose to the rank of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] and the command of his own [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]. In the wake of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], Krell oversaw the development of the [[Infiltrator probe droid]], a larger and enhanced version of the more commonplace [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droid]] with augmented weapons, [[Armor/Legends|armor]] and [[Computer/Legends|computer]] interface capabilities. Produced as part of a joint venture between [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Technician/Legends|technicians]],''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' the Infiltrator [[Droid/Legends|droid]] became central to Krell's plan to annihilate the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] in one fell swoop, making himself the hero of the war. Krell sent an Infiltrator droid designated [[13-K]] to carry out his goals—he planned to direct the [[Probe droid/Legends|probe]] to capture a Rebel [[CR90 corvette/Legends|blockade runner]], fly the commandeered [[Starship/Legends|ship]] to the Rebel [[Haven (rendezvous point)|rendezvous point]] and self-destruct the vessel, causing crippling damage. But while 13-K managed to seize the ship, the arrival of Rebel hero [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] complicated matters. Skywalker's presence activated 13-K's previous programming to capture the Rebel and bring him before the Emperor, causing the droid to turn the ship around and attempt to return to Krell's Star Destroyer. However, Skywalker's sabotage and a crucial failure in 13-K's [[logic capacitator]]s turned the blockade runner into a ticking time bomb, with its [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]] primed to blow. Although Krell desperately ordered his crew to fire on the incoming ship, the ensuing explosion ripped through the Star Destroyer and [[Death/Legends|killed]] everyone aboard. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|I'm getting something ''now.'' The fleet's in sight, the interloper has been neutralized, and—"
"And I'm moments away from getting a personal commendation from the ''Emperor!''|An Imperial officer and Damon Krell|}} Ambitious and cunning, Admiral Damon Krell desired glory and recognition above all else, coveting the attention of the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]]. That desire drove Krell's schemes to become an Imperial hero, a task he approached in a businesslike manner, looking to limit unknown factors and execute his plan expediently. However, his overconfidence in his Infiltrator probe droid proved to be his downfall, directly causing his death. ==Behind the scenes== Damon Krell first appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 45|''Star Wars'' (1977) 45]], written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and released in [[1980]]. During this appearance, Krell was illustrated by [[Carmine Infantino]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 45|''Star Wars'' (1977) 45]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 45}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Krell, Damon}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Navy admirals of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
